LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ShadowChancellor.title: shadow chancellor
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Commissioner.title: discipline officer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Commissioner.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] enforced the Stellarch's will across imperial legions. [PAWN_pronoun] crushed rebellions through public floggings and ammunition rationing, developing perfect blade control from executing deserters.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Groundskeeper.title: palace groundskeeper
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Groundskeeper.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained ornamental gardens for imperial nobles. [PAWN_pronoun] perfected rose grafting and hedge sculpting, often collaborating with royal architects on greenhouse placements.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RoyalGuard01.title: royal guard
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RoyalGuard01.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] swore blood oaths to protect the Stellarch's inner chambers. [PAWN_pronoun] trained daily following the royal guard strict regimen, developing the ability to spot menaces not visible to untrained eyes. [PAWN_possessive] vow demands lethal force against any unauthorized approach, even former comrades.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RoyalGuard02.title: chamber sentinel
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RoyalGuard02.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] protected high-ranking nobles in the imperial court. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to spot concealed weapons during audiences and defuse conflicts with measured words, though [PAWN_pronoun] never touched a tool in [PAWN_possessive] life.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ImperialAttache.title: imperial attache
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ForgottenVizier.title: forgotten vizier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Duelist01.title: duelist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Duelist01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] orchestrated a long political crisis that bankrupted two stellar nations while enriching [PAWN_possessive] secret allies. \nWhen exposed, [PAWN_pronoun] surrendered power dramatically, knowing the ensuing chaos would make [PAWN_objective] indispensable. Now [PAWN_nameDef] whispers counsel to rimworld leaders, [PAWN_possessive] "exile" carefully staged to position [PAWN_objective] as the only solution to crises [PAWN_pronoun] discreetly engineers.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ForgottenVizier.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] orchestrated a long political crisis that bankrupted two stellar nations while enriching [PAWN_possessive] secret allies. \nWhen exposed, [PAWN_pronoun] surrendered power dramatically, knowing the ensuing chaos would make [PAWN_objective] indispensable. Now [PAWN_nameDef] whispers counsel to rimworld leaders, [PAWN_possessive] "exile" carefully staged to position [PAWN_objective] as the only solution to crises [PAWN_pronoun] discreetly engineers.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ImperialAttache.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] orchestrated a long political crisis that bankrupted two stellar nations while enriching [PAWN_possessive] secret allies. \nWhen exposed, [PAWN_pronoun] surrendered power dramatically, knowing the ensuing chaos would make [PAWN_objective] indispensable. Now [PAWN_nameDef] whispers counsel to rimworld leaders, [PAWN_possessive] "exile" carefully staged to position [PAWN_objective] as the only solution to crises [PAWN_pronoun] discreetly engineers.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ShadowChancellor.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] orchestrated a long political crisis that bankrupted two stellar nations while enriching [PAWN_possessive] secret allies. \nWhen exposed, [PAWN_pronoun] surrendered power dramatically, knowing the ensuing chaos would make [PAWN_objective] indispensable. Now [PAWN_nameDef] whispers counsel to rimworld leaders, [PAWN_possessive] "exile" carefully staged to position [PAWN_objective] as the only solution to crises [PAWN_pronoun] discreetly engineers.
